creator: i@levsha.org.ua
text:
The bug is reproducible on my system ( 7.0-RELEASE )

And asterisk build without errors when in comment CFLAGS/COPTFLAGS lines
in make.conf

My CFLAGS/COPTFLAGS (when Asterisk does not build):
CFLAGS=-O -pipe -march=i686 -mtune=nocona
COPTFLAGS=-O -pipe -march=i686 -mtune=nocona
NO_CPU_CFLAGS=true
NO_CPU_COPTFLAGS=true

-- 
Mykola Dzham, LEFT-(UANIC|RIPE)
JID: levsha@jabber.net.ua
